headline: Why The Mondelez (MDLZ) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework 2026 Expectations
summary: The fair value estimate for Mondelez International has edged from US$66.88 to US$67.13, a small adjustment that still matters if you are watching entry points and upside potential. Recent Street research around the stock shows a split view, with some firms maintaining or lifting targets, including a US$70 call, while others reset toward US$62 and US$67 as they reassess the broader packaged food group into 2026. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit into the evolving Mondelez story...
